untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detection of 'eight consecutive higher highs' — a pattern spanning exactly 8 bars with each high strictly greater than the previous. The allowed indicators do not include a bar-counting or lookback mechanism to verify an 8-bar sequence constraint. The pattern requires comparing high[i] > high[i-1] for i=1..8, which cannot be expressed with the available operators and single-bar reference indicators (prev_high only references bar[i-1]).
translation_notes: To properly implement this signal, the backtest engine would need either: (1) a custom pattern indicator that counts consecutive higher highs, or (2) an extended syntax supporting multi-bar lookback like high[-1], high[-2]...high[-8]. The provided entry condition (high > prev_high) only captures a single-bar comparison and is insufficient for the true 8-bar pattern requirement.
